title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 28枚の source-heavy 版を作成しました。完成版は [output.pptx](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pptx) と [output.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pdf) です。inspection も通っていて、`28 slides / 28 pdf pages / 28 previews / Noto Sans JP embedded` まで確認済みです。[delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json) [inspection-report.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/structured-native/inspection-report.json) 台本と根拠一式も新規に作り直しています。[brief.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/brief.json) [research.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/research.json) [script-lock.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/script-lock.md) [deck-spec.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/deck-spec.json) [asset-plan.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/asset-plan.json) [content.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/content.json) [talktrack.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/talktrack.md) `nanobanana / Manus` 版も live で回しましたが、今回は完遂できませんでした。1回目は Manus task が `Unknown error`、2回目は `API 429: credit limit exceeded` で止まっています。prompt artifact 自体はできているので、credits が戻れば同じ prompt から再実行できます。[manus-prompt.txt](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/manus-prompt.txt) Lane evidence: - 主系 lane: 28枚の script-lock / deck-spec / asset-plan / content 作成と native render - sidecar lane 1: source panel / asset 配置監査 - sidecar lane 2: runtime gate / variant runner / Manus hard-gate 確認
